title: Job Application Assistant
description: Keeps each job posting, draft, cover letter, PDF, and application record connected from first review to submission.
seoTitle: Job Application Assistant Case Study | Auditable Local Application Workflow
seoDescription: A case study on Job Application Assistant, a local Chrome extension and Python backend for structured job extraction, Codex-backed drafts, cover-letter PDFs, and SQLite application tracking.
constraints: The tool handles sensitive job descriptions, profile context, draft text, application history, and generated PDFs, so storage needed to stay local and inspectable.
Job-board extraction could not rely on broad page text. Missing fields needed warnings instead of invented context.
problem: Applying to jobs was split across job boards, extension popups, local portfolio context, cover-letter drafts, PDFs, and a separate tracking habit.
Writing faster was only one part of the problem. The job snapshot, selected proof points, draft, final PDF, and application ledger also needed to stay tied together.
solution: Built a Manifest V3 Chrome extension that extracts normalized opportunity snapshots from supported job pages, lets the user review them, and sends them to a local FastAPI backend.

Indexed local profile, resume, offers, and project proof points into a context bundle, then ran one Codex draft pass that returns the draft plus angle, selected and rejected projects, decisions, claims, and warnings.
Stored draft jobs, draft JSON, generated cover-letter PDFs, and application records in SQLite, with lookup endpoints so the extension can show already-applied status.
result: Created a public local workflow where the applicant-facing text, audit trail, generated PDF, and application ledger remain inspectable on the machine.
Separated extraction, context selection, drafting, PDF export, and application logging into testable contracts instead of one fragile browser script.
Extended the workflow beyond drafting into supported Dice, Indeed, and LinkedIn apply flows while keeping manual review points and platform-confirmed logging.
deliveryHighlights: Chrome extension side panel for extraction review, draft requests, PDF actions, already-applied checks, and apply-enabled posting lists.
FastAPI backend with async draft jobs, context reindexing, draft lookup, application lookup, dashboard, and PDF export endpoints.
SQLite stores draft requests, draft JSON, job stages, timing metadata, and application records deduplicated by normalized source URL.
Contract tests cover extraction modules, prompt inputs, Codex JSON parsing, application storage, dashboard rendering, PDF export, and extension JavaScript syntax.
